channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Authorities issue travel advisory for Babusar Top amid heavy snowfall and hazardous conditions
item.description: The district administration in Naran, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa has issued a fresh travel advisory for Babusar Top, urging tourists, travellers, and transport operators to exercise extreme caution due to ong...

item.title: Tanzania launches major solar panel manufacturing plant to boost industrial growth and exports
item.description: Tanzania has officially launched what is reported to be the largest solar panel manufacturing plant in Africa, marking a major step in the country’s industrialisation and renewable energy development ...

item.title: Australians are ditching dating apps for in-person events amid swipe fatigue
item.description: Swipe fatigue is hitting Australians hard, with many abandoning dating apps in favour of in-person connections. Platforms like Tinder, Hinge, and Bumble are losing users, as people grow tired of endle...

item.title: BYD car carrier arrives in Melbourne with 5,000 EVs amid rising Australian demand
item.description: A large vehicle carrier operated by Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer BYD has docked in Melbourne, delivering around 5,000 electric vehicles to Australia in what industry analysts describe as a si...

item.title: NSCDC arraigns 24 suspects for unauthorised lithium mining in Nasarawa
item.description: The Nigeria Security and Civil Defence Corps (NSCDC) don arraign 15 Chinese nationals and nine Nigerians for illegal lithium mining for Kokona, Nasarawa State. The suspects dem appear for Federal High...

item.title: GWS Giants dominate Melbourne Demons in 49-point Alice Springs win
item.description: Melbourne Demons suffered a heavy 49-point defeat to the Greater Western Sydney Giants in Alice Springs, marking consecutive losses for the first time under coach Steven King. Despite dominating posse...

item.title: Davido denies belonging to ‘City Boys’ group and explains friendship with Seyi Tinubu
item.description: Afrobeats superstar Davido has publicly cleared the air about his relationship with Seyi Tinubu after online criticism followed his recent comments on Nigeria’s insecurity and injustice issues. The si...

item.title: California Governor Race: Scrutiny of Xavier Becerra’s Career and Competence
item.description: Xavier Becerra, the front-runner in California's gubernatorial primary, is facing criticism over his record in the Biden administration, particularly as Health and Human Services Secretary. Opponents,...

item.title: US civil rights groups file lawsuit over human rights violations at El Paso immigration camp
item.description: Civil rights organisations in the United States have initiated legal action against the country’s largest immigration detention facility, Camp East Montana, located on the Fort Bliss military base in ...

item.title: NCR secures 19th consecutive overall championship at 2026 Palarong Pambansa
item.description: The National Capital Region (NCR) once again proved its dominance in Philippine school sports after clinching its 19th straight overall championship at the 2026 Palarong Pambansa held in Agusan del Su...

item.title: Wedding clip of seven single bridesmaids sparks discussion on modern dating trends
item.description: A light-hearted wedding moment has turned into a serious online conversation after a video showed seven bridesmaids introducing themselves and all confirming they were single. What started as a playfu...

item.title: George Ruto-Linked Matatu Involved in Minor Collision with Motorcycle in Nairobi
item.description: A matatu associated with George Ruto, the youngest son of Kenyan President William Ruto, was involved in a minor road accident in Nairobi only a few weeks after undergoing a major refurbishment. The v...

item.title: Philippine health groups urge government to ban vapes and protect youth
item.description: On May 31, World No Tobacco Day, several Philippine health and youth advocacy groups called for an immediate ban on e-cigarettes, vapes, and other tobacco products marketed as safer alternatives. Grou...

item.title: Israeli forces seize Beaufort Castle and expand ground operations in southern Lebanon amid ongoing clashes with Hezbollah
item.description: Israeli forces have captured the historic Beaufort Castle and the surrounding strategic ridge in southern Lebanon during an expanded ground offensive against Hezbollah. According to reports, this mark...

item.title: Four-storey building collapses near Saket Metro, one dead and several rescued
item.description: A four-storey building collapsed near Saket metro station in Delhi, resulting in at least one death and eight injuries. The incident occurred in the Saidulajab area when debris from the top floor, whi...

item.title: Finance Ministry Highlights Economic Risks from Geopolitical Tensions and Energy Prices
item.description: India's Finance Ministry emphasized the need for policy flexibility to sustain economic growth and manage inflation amid ongoing geopolitical tensions in West Asia. In its May economic review, the min...

item.title: Meteor Likely Caused Sonic Boom Felt Across New England
item.description: A loud sonic boom that startled residents across parts of New England on Saturday afternoon was likely caused by a meteor entering Earth’s atmosphere, according to meteorologists. Police departments i...

item.title: Daily horoscope predictions for May 31, 2026
item.description: This article presents the daily horoscope forecasts for each zodiac sign for May 31, 2026, written by astrologer Sally Brompton. It also includes a brief message for readers celebrating their birthday...

item.title: Meteor Airburst Over Northeastern US Produces Sonic Booms Without Major Damage
item.description: Aik meteor jo zameen ki taraf aa raha tha, woh United States ke northeastern ilaqay ke upar hawa mein phat gaya, jis se zor daar dhamake ki awaazain sunai deen. NASA ke mutabiq, yeh waqia Saturday ko ...

item.title: Lady Fubara Urges Inclusive Policies to Support All Children in Rivers State
item.description: Wife of the Rivers State Governor, Lady Valerie Fubara, don call for stronger inclusive policies to improve the welfare of children across the state, no matter their gender or physical condition. She ...
